name: Jeanne's Cake Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, stir together the milk and flour.
2. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture is thickened and smooth; let it cool.
3. On the highest speed of a mixer, beat the cooled flour mixture with butter, shortening, and vanilla until smooth and fluffy.
4. Blend in icing sugar and salt; continue beating until the frosting is fluffy (at least 15 minutes to achieve the desired consistency).
The bakery that uses this recipe is famous in Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada for its icing. It is known that people will go across the city to buy one of these cakes for any occasion.
